display.purpose: Hero name only. Oversized Instrument Serif; emphasis turns italic brass.

title.purpose: Card subjects and names, always serif italic.

body.purpose: All running copy, DM Sans 300, 65-75ch measure.

label.purpose: DM Mono uppercase metadata, section tags, nav.

shadows.name: card-lift
shadows.purpose: The only structural shadow. On card hover, paired with translateY(-2px).

shadows.name: accent-glow
shadows.purpose: Soft brass halo on hover of ghost buttons and hero links. Atmospheric, not depth.

motion.name: ease-editorial
motion.purpose: Ease-out-expo for reveals, drawers, map transitions.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Hover/color state changes on links, cards, nav.

components.name: Ghost CTA
components.description: Primary call-to-action: transparent with a brass hairline border. Used for the Toni CTA and hero links.
components.css: .ds-cta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none; color: #c9b99a; border: 1px solid #c9b99a; padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem; background: transparent; transition: background 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease; } .ds-cta:hover { background: rgba(201,185,154,0.05); box-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(201,185,154,0.25); } .ds-cta:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #d4a853; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Tag
components.description: Mono uppercase skill/metadata tag, sharp hairline border.
components.css: .ds-tag { font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.1em; padding: 0.3rem 0.8rem; border: 1px solid #222222; color: #6b6b6b; text-transform: uppercase; }

components.name: Highlight Tag
components.description: Emphasized tag with brass border and brass text for standout credentials.
components.css: .ds-tag-hl { display: inline-block; font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 0.3rem 0.8rem; border: 1px solid rgba(201,185,154,0.2); color: #c9b99a; }

components.name: Content Card
components.description: Partner/system/early card. Flat at rest, lifts on hover. Sits on a hairline grid.
components.html:
Partnerships Built
Co-designed the Humanitec Sandbox and drove the GTM motion around it.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #0a0a0a; padding: 2.5rem; transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; } .ds-card:hover { background: #111111; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.35); } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #c9b99a; margin-bottom: 0.8rem; } .ds-card-body { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-weight: 300; font-size: 0.85rem; color: #6b6b6b; line-height: 1.7; }

components.name: Open-To Badge
components.description: The live signal: mono uppercase with a pulsing Lamp Gold dot. Reserved for status only.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 0.4rem 1rem; border: 1px solid rgba(212,168,83,0.3); color: #d4a853; } .ds-badge-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: #d4a853; animation: dsPulse 2s infinite; } @keyframes dsPulse { 0%,100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.3; } }

components.name: Section Label
components.description: Mono uppercase section tag with a brass-to-transparent divider line trailing it.
components.css: .ds-section-label { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1rem; font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.25em; color: #6b6b6b; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-section-label::after { content: ''; flex: 1; height: 1px; background: linear-gradient(to right, #c9b99a, transparent); opacity: 0.4; }

components.name: Top Navigation
components.description: Fixed blurred bar, mono uppercase links, brass on hover/active.
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 2rem; padding: 1.5rem 3rem; background: rgba(10,10,10,0.85); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border-bottom: 1px solid #222222; } .ds-nav-name { font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 13px; letter-spacing: 0.15em; color: #6b6b6b; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-nav-link { font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: #6b6b6b; text-decoration: none; text-transform: uppercase; transition: color 0.2s; } .ds-nav-link:hover, .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { color: #c9b99a; }

narrative.overview: A confidential, high-signal file on a person who closes deals and builds his own tools. Near-black paper, a worn-brass ink for the things that matter, and a single live gold marker for what is current. Monospace runs the margins as field tags; an Instrument Serif italic is the human voice between the data. Editorial first: hierarchy from type scale and the contrast between a quiet 300-weight sans body and an oversized serif display, not from boxes or color. Surfaces are flat and layered tonally; the only depth is a restrained lift on hover. Accent is rationed.
keyCharacteristics: Warm-dark, never cold: every neutral tinted toward brass, text is #f0ece4 not white.
Sharp-cornered (0 radius) surfaces with hairline #222 borders and tonal layering instead of shadow.
Oversized Instrument Serif display against quiet DM Sans body and DM Mono metadata.
One rationed accent (Aged Brass) plus one rare live signal (Lamp Gold).
Restraint as the default; motion and color are earned, not sprayed.

rules.name: The Rationed Accent Rule
rules.body: Brass and gold together stay on roughly 10% of any screen. Most of the page is Bone-on-Black. Brass marks craft and emphasis; Gold marks what is live.

rules.name: The No-White Rule
rules.body: #fff and #000 are forbidden. Text is Bone (#f0ece4); the darkest surface is Void Black (#0a0a0a). Every neutral is tinted warm.

rules.name: The Three-Voice Rule
rules.body: Serif speaks (headings, names, emphasis), Sans narrates (body), Mono tags (labels, metadata). Never mix the jobs.

rules.name: The Italic-Brass Rule
rules.body: Emphasis inside a serif heading is italic in Aged Brass, never bold, never a different size.

rules.name: The Flat-Until-Touched Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadow exists only as a response to hover. A resting element never carries a drop shadow.

dos: Do keep text Bone (#f0ece4) on Void Black (#0a0a0a). Tint every neutral warm.
Do ration accent: Brass for emphasis/craft, Gold only for the live 'open to work' signal. Keep both under ~10% of any screen.
Do use the three-voice type system: serif speaks, sans narrates, mono tags.
Do keep surfaces flat at rest; introduce the Card Lift shadow only on hover.
Do express heading emphasis as italic Brass, never bold.
Do disclose detail inline (the deal drawer), and honor prefers-reduced-motion by gating reveals, the flow stepper, and map pulses.
donts: Don't build a generic SaaS landing: no gradient blobs, no hero-metric template, no identical feature-card grids.
Don't drift toward a LinkedIn / corporate CV: no stock-blue, no buzzword soup, no timeline-resume layout.
Don't produce AI-slop dark-portfolio tropes: no neon-on-black, no decorative glassmorphism, no glowing gradient text.
Don't round corners; this system is sharp (0 radius), except the 3px tooltip and circular pulse dots.
Don't add side-stripe borders (border-left/border-right >1px as a colored accent).
Don't spray gold; if it stops being rare, it stops reading as live.
